metadata.name: 01_基础文本生成测试流
metadata.description: 最简单的 LLM 单节点处理范例

graph_json: {"elements": [{"id": "node_start", "type": "start", "position": {"x": 100, "y": 150}, "data": {"config": {"inputVariables": ["topic"]}}, "label": "开始"}, {"id": "node_llm", "type": "llm", "position": {"x": 400, "y": 150}, "data": {"config": {"modelProfileCode": "deepseek-default", "promptTemplate": "请根据主题：{topic}，写一段大约100字的简介。", "outputFormat": "text", "outputVariable": "summary"}}, "label": "文案生成"}, {"id": "node_end", "type": "end", "position": {"x": 700, "y": 150}, "data": {"config": {"outputFormat": "json", "outputFields": [{"name": "result", "type": "string", "value": "{summary}", "children": []}]}}, "label": "结束"}, {"id": "edge_node_start_node_llm", "type": "default", "source": "node_start", "target": "node_llm", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}}, {"id": "edge_node_llm_node_end", "type": "default", "source": "node_llm", "target": "node_end", "data": {"condition": ""}, "label": "", "animated": true, "style": {"stroke": "#409eff", "strokeWidth": 2}}], "nodes": [{"id": "node_start", "type": "start", "name": "开始", "config": {"inputVariables": ["topic"]}}, {"id": "node_llm", "type": "llm", "name": "文案生成", "config": {"modelProfileCode": "deepseek-default", "promptTemplate": "请根据主题：{topic}，写一段大约100字的简介。", "outputFormat": "text", "outputVariable": "summary"}}, {"id": "node_end", "type": "end", "name": "结束", "config": {"outputFormat": "json", "outputFields": [{"name": "result", "type": "string", "value": "{summary}", "children": []}]}}], "edges": [{"source": "node_start", "target": "node_llm", "type": "default", "condition": ""}, {"source": "node_llm", "target": "node_end", "type": "default", "condition": ""}]}
